description: Agent visual review of all 222 catalog images (12 batches, grid + individual inspection)
notes: Initial pass found ~55 hard fails (wrong subject, store shots, person photo, black placeholders). apply-agent-visual-fixes + hand-curate + 94% hero fill applied. Apple products use CDN where available. Samsung phones use A53 back hero. Remaining weak entries are intentional siblings where Commons lacks per-SKU shots.

batchSummaries.2: Apple iPhone 11-15 — many store/hand shots; CDN fixes applied for 14/15/16
batchSummaries.3: Apple iPhone 16-17/Mac — store shots for 16e/17; CDN for Pro models
batchSummaries.4: Apple MacBook/Watch + Samsung start — keyboard crops, MacBook cafe shots fixed via CDN
batchSummaries.5: Samsung A/M — galaxy-a54 person photo CRITICAL; black placeholders; fixed A53 back
batchSummaries.6: Samsung S series — duplicates and mall shots; unified A53 back heroes
batchSummaries.7: Samsung tabs/watches/fold — tab duplicates, watch UI icons; Tab S9 + Watch4 fixes
batchSummaries.8: Samsung TVs + Vivo — TV donor OK; Vivo store/hand shots hand-curated
batchSummaries.9: Vivo X/Y — massive X50 donor duplicates; per-model Vivo backs assigned
batchSummaries.10: Xiaomi POCO/Redmi — store interiors, security tags; clean POCO F4/K40 backs
batchSummaries.11: Xiaomi/Sony — PS4 labeled as PS5 fixed; Sony TV living room → Bravia Flickr
batchSummaries.12: Sony audio/TV — all WH/WF using same earbud donor fixed; echo-dot pass
